question: Show the name of the teacher for the math course.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.Name FROM course_arrange AS T1 JOIN course AS T2 ON T1.Course_ID  =  T2.Course_ID JOIN teacher AS T3 ON T1.Teacher_ID  =  T3.Teacher_ID WHERE T2.Course  =  "Math"
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.nm FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.teac_id = T2.teac_id JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.cour_id = T3.cour_id WHERE T3.cour = 'math'
raw_response: SELECT T1.nm FROM teacher AS T1 JOIN course_arrange AS T2 ON T1.teac_id = T2.teac_id JOIN course AS T3 ON T2.cour_id = T3.cour_id WHERE T3.cour = 'math'
